Wallet

Marcus

Demo Mode Active — Policy engine and agent logic are fully functional. Wallet execution is simulated.

Wallet

Connect and manage your Loop wallet. All executions run in simulation mode until a live wallet is connected.

Wallet

Connect a Loop wallet to enable live execution. Without a wallet, the agent runs in simulation mode.

Gas Estimate

Connect a wallet to see fee estimates.

Holdings

Connect a wallet to see holdings.

Active Contracts

Connect a wallet to see active Daml contracts.

Capability Status

Intent Parser
Rule-based NL parser
REAL
Policy Engine
11-step evaluation pipeline
REAL
Market Data
Mock opportunities from DB
SIMULATED
Wallet Connection
No wallet connected
DISABLED
Transaction Signing
Connect wallet to enable
DISABLED
Real Execution
All executions are simulated
SIMULATED
Contract Queries
Requires live wallet
DISABLED
Server Signing
Disabled (set LOOP_SERVER_SIGNING_ENABLED=true to enable)
DISABLED
